# Navigatte

> AI and software development agency delivering premium digital solutions, custom web platforms, automated workflows, and enterprise transformations.

## Main Pages

- [Home](/) - Hero introduction, services overview, client testimonials, and features.
- [About](/about) - Company vision, mission, methodology (stepper workflow), and platforms (SIMS, Governance, Audit, AI).
- [Projects](/projects) - Dynamic portfolio grid featuring recent work across websites, SaaS platforms, and automation systems, filterable by tags.

## Core Offerings & Services

- **Digital Platforms:** Responsive websites and visual designs.
- **Enterprise Applications:** High-availability scalable architectures.
- **AI & Automation:** Workflow automation, data processing, and custom AI integrations.
- **Cloud Engineering:** Migration, architecture, and infrastructure management.
- **Data Intelligence:** Interactive reporting and analytics dashboards.

## Portfolio Highlights

- **Furniture Co. Marketing Site:** Redesign with integrated headless CMS.
- **Fintech SaaS Dashboard:** Multi-tenant analytics dashboard with WebSockets.
- **Retail Mobile Companion App:** Loyalty rewards and push notifications.
- **Enterprise SAP Cloud Migration:** S/4HANA migration with zero downtime.
- **Ops Workflow Automation Platform:** Automated integration cutting entry tasks by 60%.
